extDesc.message: Hold a YouTube live at a fixed delay behind live so you and your friends stay frame-synced for reactions.

popupSubtitle.message: Hold live at a fixed delay. Friends pick the same number → synced.

popupHint.message: Everyone sets the same number → synced. This is the default; fine-tune per stream with −/+ on the on-page HUD. Can't go below the stream's real latency floor.
